items.claim: Cody Gibson is likely on his way out of the UFC with a loss here.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's probably on his way out of the UFC with a loss here.
The 38-year-old out of St. Louis Abyspo, California will likely lose to the UFC debuting fighter

items.claim: Abdul Hussein hits significantly hard for being 5'5.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein hits significantly hard for being 5'5.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein knocked out Tyson Nam in his last fight outside of the UFC.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein knocked out an old UFC veteran in Nam in his last fight outside of the UFC.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's entire run in the UFC is three and seven amongst two separate runs.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's entire run in the UFC is three and seven amongst two separate runs.

items.claim: Cody Gibson lost by second-round submission to Deon Blackshere.
items.quote: He got submitted in the second round by Deon Blackshere.

items.claim: Cody Gibson got knocked out in 25 seconds by Ori Lang in his last fight.
items.quote: And in his last fight, he got knocked out in 25 seconds by Ori Lang.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is much bigger than Abdul Hussein with a five-inch height advantage.
items.quote: Yes, Cody Gibson is much bigger than him. He's got five inches in height.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzanibio is about to be 40 later in the year.
items.quote: Ponzanibio is going to be 40 later in the year.
